assets.alt: Flat liquid-glass founder profile card with a voice mark and outgoing signal on a rose mesh background
assets.notes: Generated with Codex image generation and saved to the owned post asset directory.
assets.final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: wide blog hero. Source context from article: The article helps a B2B founder choose an agency for founder-led LinkedIn content. The central idea is that the right agency captures the founder's real voice, turns it into profile-native content, and connects buyer attention to sales follow-up. Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor inferred from the article source context: a single flat liquid-glass founder profile card paired with one small outgoing signal card. Use one or two relevant elements only. Do not show a funnel, outbound workflow, account map, CRM board, content dashboard, or many connected cards. Style reference: Use the Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style: generated raster PNG, softly blended mesh gradient background using soft rose as the main color plus a close peach complement, matte translucent liquid-glass shapes, simple head-on flat UI, consistent white outline weight, clean negative space, and subtle grain. Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1600x700. Place one central flat glass subject with quiet space around it. Keep the graphic readable as a single concept, not an infographic or screenshot. Scene/backdrop: Soft rose and pale peach mesh gradient only. Blend colors smoothly without hard edges. Avoid multi-color mesh palettes. Subject: One founder profile card with an abstract voice mark and one small outgoing signal card. Markings must be abstract and non-readable: short white lines and simple shapes only. Present the graphic completely flat and head-on, with no angled or isometric view. Detail density: Low. Simple, spacious, and specific. Avoid decorative filler. Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, fake metrics, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards full of metrics, overcomplicated UIs, CRM boards, funnels, content calendars, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, or three-quarter UI view.
